GAME
Cultivate wizards and unleash your magic
Enter a world of magic and mystery, where the fate of the battle lies in your hands.
Become the master of spells and sorcery, and emerge victorious in the ultimate duel of wizards.
Register today and get early access and exclusive airdrops!
Register
GAME
Cyber Racing Star
See you at the finish line.
Next-generation racing experience that truly immerses you in speed and excitement.
Personalized car customization system that allows you to create a unique racing machine.
Diverse tracks and challenges that allow you to showcase your driving skills.
Multiplayer online competition and leaderboard system that allows you to compete against players from around the world.

TEAM
Edwin
COFOUNDER | Head of BusinessDevelopment
An early Blockchain adopter excellent insights into blockchain. Experinced in Incubating blockchain projects.
Kathy
Head of Partnerships
An experienced sales account manager, client onboarding, and relationship executive.
Lennie
3D Art Director
Independent 3d Artist produced 3d assets for animation, gaming and film . She has worked on several independent games as a 3d art director.
Mason
COFOUNDER | Head of Technology
Specialist in computer graphics and game development. Senior Tech Developer for over 10years. Previously working in Nvidia.
Liz
Concept Art Director
Working in the film and game industry for over 10 years. Good at environment concept design, digital scenic painting and illustration for graphics.
Philp
Head of DApps Development
Senior Software Developer. Early dapp developer of many famous blockchains like Etherum , Difinity and Solana.
Alex
COFOUNDER | Head of Operations
A Web 3 community specialist and an avid gamer for over 20 years with an in-depth knowledge of multiple platforms & games.
Jimmy
Game producer
Former game producer at Netease and Funplus, with extensive experience in research and development, Involved in numerous games generating monthly revenue of up to 100 million or even 1 billion.
1/8
ROADMAP

  • Gameplay design
  • Concept art design
